## Description

Brief description of the walkthrough topic.

## Checklist

- [ ] Post file follows naming convention: `posts/YYYY-MM-DD-title/index.qmd`
- [ ] Front matter includes: title, date, author(s), categories
- [ ] Images are in `posts/YYYY-MM-DD-title/images/`
- [ ] Links to related Issue (Closes #_____)
- [ ] Preview locally with `quarto preview` - no errors or warnings
- [ ] Content includes:
  - [ ] Brief introduction
  - [ ] Step-by-step instructions
  - [ ] Code examples with syntax highlighting
  - [ ] Key takeaways
  - [ ] Links to further resources
- [ ] Checked existing posts for category naming consistency
- [ ] Added any non-standard assets to `.github/_quarto.yml` ignore list (if needed)

## Related Issue

Closes #

### For Reviewers

- [ ] Content is clear
- [ ] Code examples are accurate and well-formatted
- [ ] Links work correctly
- [ ] Images display properly
- [ ] Post renders correctly in preview
